title: Cloud token access for open Delta Sharing sharing (GA)
body:
Eligible managed and external Delta tables shared using the open Delta Sharing protocol now support directory-based access mode. Databricks includes the table's cloud storage location and temporary cloud credentials in sharing responses, allowing recipients whose clients support directory-based access to read directly from cloud storage without using pre-signed URLs.

See [Cloud token eligibility](/aws/en/opensharing/create-share#cloud-token-eligibility) for eligibility requirements and data privacy considerations.
